titleStmt.title: SII 24.96: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 96. (A.R. No. 5 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Damaged. Records sale of land to Ādityaṉ of Tiruviñjalūr-nāḍu, under orders of Pārthivēndra Brahmādhirāja. The record is dated in the 42nd year of the king's reign.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavuntannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻi lāl putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvarai porppari naṭātti kirttiyai niṟutti vaṭaticai vākaicūṭit tenticait temaru kamalappūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum nannilappāvaiyiṉ tanimaiyun tavirttu punitaṟṟirumaṇi makuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭi taṉṉa
ṭi Iraṇṭun taṭamuṭiyākat tonnila ventar cūṭa muṉṉāḷ manuvāṟu peruka kaliyāṟu vaṟuppa ceṅkol ticai toṟum cella veṇkuṭai Iru nila viḷāka veṅkaṇun tan ponnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa Innāḷ piṟkulappiṟai pol niṟpiḻai Ennuñ colletir koṭiṟṟallatu vikkalan kallata naṅkili
ttuṅkapattiraiyaḷavum Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa tanmānamuṅ kūṟina viramuṅ kiṭappa Eṟiṉa malaikaḷu mutuku neḷippa Iḻinta (n)etikaḷum cuḻanṟuṭaintoṭa viḻunta kaṭa vāḷeriroṇkaṇ maṭantayariṭṭamu miḷātu kuṭutta veṅkari niraiyuṅ kaṅkamaṇṭalamum pāṇi Iraṇṭum Oru vicaik kaikkoṇ pukaḻoṭu pāṇṭi maṇṭalaṅ koḷḷa t
varuparittaraṅkamum pe talaṅkaḷun tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenkaṭal paṭarvatu polattan peruñcenai Evippañcavaraiyvarum poruta raṇenappukka kāṭa maṟṟavar tammai jeya toṟu niṟuttu muttin calāpamu muttamiḻ potiyiṉum veṅkari paṭumai tennāṭ ṭellai kāṭṭik kuṭamalai nāṭṭuḷḷa cāveṟallām tani vicum peṟa māveṟi
kalar kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟitoṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷit tiṟai koḷ siṅ hāsanat ṉiyāramun tiruppuyattaraṅkamum pola vīramun tiyākamum vi vīrasiṅhāsanattu viṟṟirunta ruḷiya kovirājakecaripanmarāna tripuvana cakkaravarttikaḷ śrī kulottuṅka coḻatevaṟku 4 10 2 Āvatu pāṇṭikulācaṉi vaḷanāṭṭu viḷānāṭṭu śrī kāriyam ceykiṟa pārttiventra bramhmādhirājar Eval paṭi tiruveṅkaṭappiccarum periya tiruvanan=ta va
yyum tiruvaraṅkattamutum Oli konṟai pāratāyan Ārāvamutum Āritan kecavan kecavan Āritan cīrākavan periyānum koyil kaṇakkut tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyā nampiyum Ampalak kūttaṉāṉa Ārāvamutu villiyum patineṭṭu nāṭṭu Āḻvār kanmikaḷom nāṭṭu tiruviñcaṉūr nāṭṭu Ātittaṉukku tirunantavānappuṟam
virājamahentra vaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūr nāṭṭu Āḻvār c ceyya vaṇa kiṭanta nilattil varkku pāṟkellai meṟkum tenpāṟkellai Ulokamātevi viḷākattukku vaṭakku melpāṟ kellai varakātevi viḷākattukku kiḻakkum vaṭa pāṟkellai ḷikku nirpāyum teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta peru nāṉ kellaiyuḷ naṭuvu paṭṭa nilam kiḻpāṟkellai vāḻaikkuṟicci
lai meṟpaṭiyūr nilattukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai Āka I perunānkellai ka nilam Arai kkum nilavilai veli Oṟṟukku raiyeya rayeya māvum śrī paṇṭāratte Oṭukki periya tirukkopurattukku mukkolāl Aḷa Āḻvār śrī paṇṭārattu tukku ḷa 8 ḷa Āka (1/2) nilam Arai �
Innellu nāṟkalane Irutūṇikkuṟuṇi kellai pāṟkellai rāja kellai lap paṇṇaikkut teṟkum Āka Ivvicainta perunāṉ kellaiyuḷ naṭuvu paṭṭa nilam kuḻi tirunantavānam ceyyum kāñcikkuṟi tiruvaraṅka mahānampi Āka Āḷ Iraṇṭukku
kācu 2- nāl ḷa 4 10 ḷa 2 Āka puncai varicai Aḷakku Āka Āṇṭu tukku viṭṭa Uyyak koṇṭā num perāl ceytukoḷḷap peṟuvā ceyyak kaṭavaralla
ceyyumiṭattu kāñcikkuṟi tiruvaraṅka vārāka ntavan Ātittanukku Āḻvār kanmikaḷe Ippaṭikku nālūrttirunāṭuṭaiyā nampi
Digital edition of SII 24.96 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
